title: Introduction to Microsoft Publisher
venue: Queens Public Library at Jackson Heights
description: Adults are invited to learn the basics of Microsoft Publisher. Register by phone or in person. (718) 899-2500

title: Queens Business Expo 2026
description: Join us for the 2026 Business Expo, the premier event of the year for entrepreneurs, industry leaders, and innovators. With over 140 exhibitors showcasing the latest in products, services, and technologies, this is your chance to connect with top-tier professionals, explore new business opportunities, and stay ahead of the curve in today’s fast-paced market. Breakout session at the […]

title: M/WBE Certification “101” Session
description: The Queens Chamber of Commerce and NYC Small Business Services (SBS) present a complimentary workshop as part of Queens County’s largest expo in the borough in celebration of the NYC Small Business Month. If you are a minority small business owner looking to sell services to the government, certification is essential—this is your opportunity to […]

title: Art Class (Adults)
description: The Jackson Heights Art Club offers several weekly adult classes in watercolor, oil, acrylic, pastel and drawing. Each student receives individual guidance and assistance from our professional instructors at the Club’s Studio. One may register or learn more about the classes by visiting their website or calling (718) 426-9821

title: ESL Conversation Club
description: Come learn & practice English using everyday real world scenarios. All levels. 4pm Basic Lesson 5pm Conversation Free & Open to all Run by 34th Avenue Open Streets Coalition

title: Paella Nights @ Addictive Wine and Tapas
description: Our Paella de Mariscos is a signature of coastal Spain. Meticulously made to order with the precision that defines Spanish culinary artistry. Succulent shrimp, tender calamari, mussels, and vegetables are gently simmered in saffron infused rice, enriched with piquillo peppers, and a whisper of Fino sherry. Each grain absorbs centuries of tradition. This is paella […]

title: Show Up for 115th Precinct Community Meetings
description: Across the country, people are demanding accountability around ICE and the treatment of immigrant communities. That’s why we’re organizing monthly turnout to the 115th Precinct Community Council meeting in Jackson Heights, where residents can speak directly with precinct leadership, ask questions, and raise concerns. Why show up: Build visible community presence Raise concerns about ICE, policing practices, […]

title: Heightened Scrutiny Documentary
address: 45-50 Van Dam St, Long Island City, NY 11101, USA
description: Join us on May 19th for a free screening of Heightened Scrutiny – a documentary that follows Chase Strangio, ACLU attorney and the first out trans person to argue before the Supreme Court, as he fights a high-stakes legal battle to overturn Tennessee’s ban on gender-affirming care for transgender youth. Location: Little Theater FREE RSVP HERE

title: Go Chase Your Dreams Premiere
description: Artists in Queens Grantee: Midori Larsen The World Premiere of Go Chase Your Dreams is a new choral work written by composer Midori Larsen for Stephen A. Halsey Junior High School 157 Chorus. It will premiere at the JHS 157 Spring Concert on Tuesday, May 19, 2026, at 7:00 PM. The piece, inspired by stories and […]

title: Holman Alvarez Trio | Jazz
